title: Synthesize final JSON research report
scope: Write the final JSON report requested by the user, combining worker findings into a concise but deep decision-oriented breakdown.
goals: Include executive summary, bottom-line recommendation, option matrix, detailed options, implementation paths, source list, uncertainties, and rejected/weak options.
Include decision paths for different assumptions: no separate API spend, willing to pay API usage, local-only/privacy-first, and highest autocomplete quality.
Separate facts, recommendations, preferences, speculation, and confidence levels.
If any narrow web lookup is needed during synthesis, use the web-discovery workflow with ketch and cite retrieved sources directly.
non_goals: Do not perform new broad research unless handoffs expose a narrow gap.
Do not mark the report as verified.
safety: Do not read tmp/, archive/, or prompt-buffer.md.
Do not edit files tagged human-written.
Do not use browser automation or sessionful retrieval.
Use valid JSON only for the final report.
success_criteria: Final report is parseable by jq.
All major claims have source URLs or are marked as inference/speculation.
